Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IAbstractEventActionTable

All Superinterfaces:
ICorrespondence, IEventActionTable, IPOGState, IState
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEventActionTable
public interface IAbstractEventActionTable extends IEventActionTable, ICorrespondence
This class provides information on the actions of the abstract event (being refined by some concrete event).
Since:
1.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final IStateType<IAbstractEventActionTable>
    STATE_TYPE
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<BecomesEqualTo>
    getDisappearingWitnesses()
    Returns the list of deterministic abstract actions that should be used as witnesses for disappearing variables.
    List<ISCAction>
    getSimActions()
    Returns the array of abstract actions that need to be simluated in a refinement of the (abstract) event.
    List<Assignment>
    getSimAssignments()
    Returns the array of abstract (non-deterministic) assignments that need to be simluated in a refinement of the (abstract) event.

  • Field Details

    • STATE_TYPE

      static final IStateType<IAbstractEventActionTable> STATE_TYPE

  • Method Details

    • getDisappearingWitnesses

      List<BecomesEqualTo> getDisappearingWitnesses()
      Returns the list of deterministic abstract actions that should be used as witnesses for disappearing variables.
      Returns:
      the list of deterministic abstract actions that should be used as witnesses for disappearing variables

    • getSimActions

      List<ISCAction> getSimActions()
      Returns the array of abstract actions that need to be simluated in a refinement of the (abstract) event.

      The parsed and type-checked assignements corresponding to the actions can be retrieved via getSimAssignments().

      Returns:
      the array of abstract actions that need to be simluated
      See Also:
      • getSimAssignments()

    • getSimAssignments

      List<Assignment> getSimAssignments()
      Returns the array of abstract (non-deterministic) assignments that need to be simluated in a refinement of the (abstract) event.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of actions returned by getSimActions().

      Returns:
      array of abstract assignments that need to be simluated
